title: Simcat 7 Piece Whiskey Decanter Set with 6 Glasses in Gift Box, 750ml Crystal Decanter Set with 6 Whiskey Glasses
features: 【Whiskey Decanter Set for Men and Women】Our whiskey decanter set comes with a deluxe box.Whiskey decanter and glasses is a perfect for any occasions such as Birthday, Father's Day, Engagement, Wedding Anniversary, Christening.They will be surprised when they open this present. Treat yourself or gift for special person.

【Clear Whisky Decanter Set】This whisky decanter set is Made of premium glass, easy to clean and maintain. The diamond pattern design is displayed on all sides of the whiskey glasses and the decanter bottle. It's comfortable to hold the glass cup and they have a good look and feel.

【Beautiful Classy Design】Pouring whiskey into these old-fashioned whiskey glasses from the elegant decanter, watching the whiskey in the classic and attractive whiskey glasses sparkling beautifully under the light. They can be used for personal use, friends gathering, business parties
【6 x 310ml Glass】Stylish whiskey glasses from the Fjord line will delight with its designer shape with characteristic depressions in the bottom, which resemble ice crystals.
【Dishwasher Safe】Whiskey glass and decanter set is dishwasher safe.Gorgeous whiskey glass set with decanter delivers the fullest flavor and a great drinking experience .
description: This premium set includes 1 crystal decanter and 6 whiskey glasses, all packed in a sleek gift box – perfect for both use and gifting.​ Crafted with clear crystal, the decanter preserves whiskey's aroma, while the 6 glasses offer a smooth sipping experience. Ideal for enjoying bourbon, scotch, or whiskey with friends, or as a sophisticated present for enthusiasts.
